title: Moving Mole
wikitext:
[]: Moving Mole?             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 07, 2008 8:13 am OK, in ep 9, when Kaji puts his arms around Ritsuko and says: Hmm... A woman, with a mole like a tear on her check, is destined to a life full of heartache and sorrow.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Jan 07, 2008 8:23 am Isn't she just looking in a mirror?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jan 07, 2008 8:53 am BobBQ wrote: Isn't she just looking in a mirror?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jan 08, 2008 8:43 am Ha! I found something! In ep 21, when Ritsuko first met Misato, Ritsuko didn't have a mole on her left cheek. But this was when her hair was blonde, so it was after she joined Gehirin. But earlier when she still had dark brown hair, THE MOLE WAS THERE!

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue Jan 08, 2008 9:41 am hmm very interesting im playing gfos 1 so ill see if it moves in that here are your screens by the way. *edit* couldent see any chang in the mole in gfos so far but I found a nice image of Toji picking his nose.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 08, 2008 10:16 am The 21 mole is a visual continuity error. The mole is present 2 cuts earlier when her and Misato are getting their food, before sitting down at the table, where the mole is missing for the next 2 cuts.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue Jan 08, 2008 10:18 am Ornette wrote: The 21 mole is a visual continuity error. The mole is present 2 cuts earlier when her and Misato are getting their food, before sitting down at the table, where the mole is missing for the next 2 cuts.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Jan 08, 2008 11:05 am seems to me she was just looking in the bathroom mirror

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 08, 2008 7:18 pm V wrote: seems to me she was just looking in the bathroom mirror
